mxCell.value: Gemini 2.5 Flash Google AI Studio (Image Generation)
HTTPS / REST API | Authorization: Bearer JWT
NOTE: Token auto-refreshes via Axios request interceptor (getIdToken(true))
Frontend polling (every 5 seconds, max 60 attempts = 5 min)
{ status, imageUrl } → if completed → render image | if failed → show error
Next.js 14 (App Router) SSR / SSG / React Server Components
Zustand 4.4 (+ persist) Auth / Cart / Favorites Store
Firebase SDK 11.10 Auth Client (getIdToken, signIn, signOut)
Vercel Frontend Hosting Next.js 14 + Global CDN CI/CD from GitHub
Render.com Backend Hosting Node.js + Express CI/CD from GitHub
Firebase Auth Identity Provider JWT Issuance
Cloud Firestore NoSQL Database users/products orders/generations
Firebase Storage Image Files PNG public URLs
Google AI Studio Gemini 2.5 Flash Image generateContent API
MyMemory API VI → EN Translation (Free, no key required)
Axios Interceptor Flow — Token Injection & 401 Retry
refreshToken() getIdToken(true) Retry original request with new token
Both layers use ADMIN_EMAILS env var. Layer 1 prevents UI navigation. Layer 2 enforces at API level — even if frontend is bypassed, API returns 403.
Error Propagation Flow — Source → Backend Response → User Message
Firebase Auth auth/email-already-in-use auth/wrong-password auth/too-many-requests auth/user-disabled
Google Gemini API RESOURCE_EXHAUSTED INVALID_ARGUMENT DEADLINE_EXCEEDED No inlineData returned
Firestore Connection error Permission denied Document not found
Joi Validation Missing required field Wrong data type Length constraint
429 Too Many Requests { message: "Too many requests" }
🔄 Auto-refresh token → silent retry If still 401 → redirect /login
next build TypeScript check Tailwind purge
npm install (no build step — ESM source)
⚠ Cold start: 30–50s after 15 min idle (free tier)
Env variables set in Vercel / Render dashboard: • NEXT_PUBLIC_* • FIREBASE_* • GOOGLE_AI_API_KEY • ADMIN_EMAILS
Firebase (Auth / Firestore / Storage) → No deployment step managed by Google
